summary: Completed testing of iteration 9 features: 3-tab registration (Клиент/Фирма/Майстор) with Булстат validation. All 18 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ Registration page has 3 tabs: Клиент, Фирма, Майстор
✅ Фирма tab shows mandatory 'Булстат (ЕИК)' field with red asterisk (*)
✅ Фирма tab shows '9 цифри' helper text under Булстат field
✅ Фирма tab shows Telegram info box with blue background
✅ Майстор tab shows 'Име на майстор' label and 'Иван Иванов - Електротехник' placeholder
✅ Майстор tab shows Telegram info box (same as Фирма)
✅ Майстор tab does NOT show Булстат field (correct)
✅ Клиент tab does NOT show Булстат field (correct)
✅ Клиент tab does NOT show Telegram info box (correct)
✅ API rejects company registration without Булстат (400 error)
✅ API rejects company registration with empty Булстат (400 error)
✅ API rejects company registration with <9 digit Булстат (400 error)
✅ API rejects company registration with >9 digit Булстат (400 error)
✅ API rejects company registration with non-numeric Булстат (400 error)
✅ API rejects company registration with duplicate Булстат (400 error)
✅ API accepts company registration with valid 9-digit Булстат
✅ API accepts master registration without Булстат
✅ Master user can access /api/my-company (returns company profile)
✅ Master user can access /api/my-leads (returns leads list)
✅ Master user can access /api/my-portfolio (returns portfolio)
✅ Master user can access /api/leads/free-status
✅ Master registration redirects to /dashboard (company dashboard)
✅ Client registration redirects to /dashboard/client
✅ Company registration redirects to /dashboard
✅ /api/auth/me returns bulstat field for company users
✅ Company dashboard accessible by both company and master user types
✅ Frontend Булстат input filters non-numeric characters
✅ Frontend Булстат input limited to 9 characters max
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing - company, master, and client types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 fully tested. 3-tab registration working correctly. Булстат validation for companies (9 digits, mandatory). Masters have same access as companies but don't need Булстат. SMS integration removed from scope. Test credentials: stroi@test.bg / test12345 (company), master@test.bg / test12345 (master), ivan_client@test.bg / test12345 (client).

three_tab_registration.details: TabsList with 3 tabs: Клиент (client), Фирма (company), Майстор (master)

company_bulstat_field.details: Булстат (ЕИК) field shown only on Фирма tab, mandatory with red asterisk, 9 digits validation

master_no_bulstat.details: Майстор tab shows Telegram box but NO Булстат field

client_no_extra_fields.details: Клиент tab shows basic fields only - no Булстат, no Telegram

bulstat_validation_backend.details: API validates: not empty, exactly 9 digits, numeric only, not duplicate

master_company_access.details: Masters can access all company endpoints: /my-company, /my-leads, /my-portfolio, /leads/free-status

auth_me_bulstat.details: /api/auth/me returns bulstat field for company users

notes.telegram_integration: Working from iteration 8 - Telegram info box shown for Фирма and Майстор tabs
